message:
fix(connection): close commit_pre_txn timing on all early-return paths (bd-hjkbr.1)

Record FSQLITE_COMMIT_PRE_TXN_TIME_NS on the vtab-sync-failure and
concurrent-plan-failure early returns in both commit paths so the
wall-time ledger stays closed even on error paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
